cases.name: review_layered_sdk
cases.prompt: Review an SDK that has createSimpleSubscription(...) for beginners and separate Customer/Product/Price/Subscription primitives for advanced users.
assertions: identifies beginner, novice, and expert users
evaluates flexible, gradual, and convenient dimensions
checks whether the simple wrapper exposes or documents underlying primitives
flags semantic surprises between simple and advanced layers

cases.name: diagnose_second_use_case_friction
cases.prompt: Users finish our quickstart but struggle when adding a second payment method. Diagnose the API design issue.
assertions: frames the issue as ladder steepness or gradualness
asks what concepts are newly required
does not over-focus on naming style
